requirements_delivered: All 24 v1 requirements: SEC-01/02/03, NAV-01..06, WEATHER-01..05, WEATHER-09, CLOCK-01..05, SYSTEM-01..04
requirements_pending: v2 candidates carried forward in milestones/v1.0-REQUIREMENTS.md § 'v2 Requirements': WEATHER-06 (multi-day/hourly forecast), WEATHER-07 (user-configurable location override), CLOCK-06 (user-configurable timezone with DST), CLOCK-07 (alarm/stopwatch), NAV-07 (long-press semantics), NAV-08 (last-view persistence across reboots).
Plus 11 UX ideas deferred from phase discussions (see milestones/v1.0-ROADMAP.md § 'Deferred UX Ideas').

human_actions_pending.action: Decide on next milestone: v1.1 (small enhancements) vs v2 (larger scope like multi-day forecast or long-press UX)
human_actions_pending.context: No milestone declared. Deferred v2 candidates in v1.0-REQUIREMENTS.md § v2 Requirements + 11 UX ideas in v1.0-ROADMAP.md § Deferred UX Ideas.

session_lessons.lesson: Human-verify caught two design defects that automated verify could not: (1) Plan 02.1-01 layout regression (led to revert + WEATHER-08 drop); (2) Plan 03-01 manual TZ_OFFSET brittleness (led to Plan 03-02 gap-closure redirecting CLOCK-02). Both were resolved cleanly with tools built for the case (/gsd:undo, /gsd:quick, gap-closure plan-within-phase).

ip-api's default JSON response OMITS extended fields like `offset` and `query`. Always request them explicitly via `?fields=`. Discovered mid-verify on Plan 03-02 (fix c23bb5a); caught proactively on Plan 04-01 by carrying the anti-pattern into the plan text.
session_lessons.evidence: .planning/.continue-here.md § Critical Anti-Patterns has this as a persistent entry; commit c23bb5a is the retroactive fix.

session_lessons.lesson: Symmetric pattern reuse (weather_view's cache-status inline read → clock_view's should_sync → system_view's dual-gate render) accelerated Phase 3 and Phase 4 planning substantially. Encapsulation of upstream fetches into a single bootstrap.fetch() at the end unified this. Consider making 'cache-status inline read + main.py-gated render' the standard template for any future view.
session_lessons.evidence: Phase 2.1 D-31, Phase 3 D-38, Phase 4 D-41; all locked into bootstrap.py + weather_view/clock_view/system_view at v1 close.

session_lessons.lesson: Phase directory rename would have been cleaner (`02.1-location-label-+-fetch-retry` no longer describes the phase's actual scope), but was explicitly deferred to avoid breaking git blame/log. Same tension with `.planning/codebase/*.md` — deferred at v1 archive. General pattern: at each phase's discuss/execute, decide up-front whether to rename retroactively or preserve history.
session_lessons.evidence: The scope-cleanup quick task explicitly preserved the phase directory name; the milestone archive notes the codebase/*.md as technical debt for v2 /gsd:map-codebase.

notable_deviations.topic: Phase 3 shipped 1 plan then grew to 2 plans mid-flight
notable_deviations.captured_in_discuss: CONTEXT.md assumed hardcoded TZ_OFFSET (matching CLOCK-02's original wording)
notable_deviations.actual: Plan 03-02 gap-closure redirected CLOCK-02 to auto-derived + persisted. Handled cleanly with 2 waves in the same phase; CONTEXT.md D-35 was updated (not rewritten) via a cross-phase quick task 260718-remove-spinner-tune-cadence.
notable_deviations.impact: Phase stayed on-track. CLOCK-02 wording in REQUIREMENTS.md was rewritten to reflect the delivered form.

notable_deviations.topic: Post-verify refactor folded into v1.0 tag (option A) rather than tagged as v1.0.1
notable_deviations.captured_in_discuss: Packaging decision presented at end of quick task 260718-rename-bootstrap
notable_deviations.actual: Operator chose option A. The v1.0 tag therefore points at `a20bb0e` (includes refactor), not at `9cce78e` (Phase 4 closeout — pure verified-on-device state).
notable_deviations.impact: One tag instead of two. Operator re-verified the refactor on-device before archiving, so the v1.0 tag DOES point at a verified state — just not a bytewise-identical one to the original human-verify snapshot. Documented in milestones/v1.0-ROADMAP.md § Post-Verify Refactor Included.

next_action: Run /gsd:new-milestone when ready to scope v1.1 or v2. Alternative: /gsd:map-codebase to refresh .planning/codebase/*.md and CLAUDE.md before scoping (recommended given the bootstrap.py refactor left prose docs stale).
context_notes: Working tree clean; branch synced with origin. All 4 completed phase directories have VERIFICATION.md files with PASSED verdicts. Three quick-task directories under .planning/quick/ document post-shipping cross-phase changes. Milestone archive in .planning/milestones/v1.0-{ROADMAP,REQUIREMENTS}.md is frozen. The device on the operator's desk is running bootstrap.py + weather_view.py + clock_view.py + system_view.py at the state of commit a20bb0e (per operator's re-verify confirmation). No open bugs, no pending human actions, no in-flight code.
